name: Chocolate-Fudge Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Generously grease a 12-cup bundt pan.
In a small saucepan over low heat, mix together chocolate and oil.
Stir often until smooth and set aside. Sift together flour, cocoa,
baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a separate bowl.
In a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed,
beat Egg and Egg whites, Sugar, and coffee granules until very light
and fluffy. Turn the mixer to low and beat in half of the dry
ingredients. Beat in yogurt, vanilla extract, 1/4 cup water, chocolate
mixture, and remaining dry ingredients until smooth.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 40-45 minutes or
until a toothpick inserted into the middle comes out clean. Allow to
cool completely on a wire rack. Invert the cake onto the rack and then
onto a serving platter.
